name: PEGU Institutional Flow Pro
cap:
PEGU Institutional Flow Pro is a premium institutional order-flow indicator designed to identify where large market participants may be accumulating or distributing positions using volume, momentum, trend, and candle pressure analysis.

Key Features
Institutional volume detection using volume expansion logic
Bullish and bearish pressure zone identification
Candle pressure analysis to measure buying and selling strength
RSI momentum confirmation
Trend filtering with EMA
Heatmap-style candle coloring for instant market sentiment visualization
Automatic institutional flow zones
Clean professional dashboard
Non-repainting BUY and SELL signals
Mobile-friendly chart design
Real-time alerts
code:
//@version=6
indicator("PEGU Institutional Flow Pro", overlay=true, max_boxes_count=100, max_labels_count=50)

//━━━━━━━━━━ INPUTS
emaLen          = input.int(200, "Trend EMA")
volLen          = input.int(20, "Volume MA Length")
volMult         = input.float(1.5, "Institutional Volume Multiplier", step=0.1)
momLen          = input.int(14, "Momentum RSI Length")
atrLen          = input.int(14, "ATR Length")

zoneExtend      = input.int(20, "Pressure Zone Extend", minval=5, maxval=60)
maxZones        = input.int(4, "Max Active Zones", minval=1, maxval=10)
signalCooldown  = input.int(10, "Signal Cooldown Bars", minval=3, maxval=100)
signalScore     = input.int(70, "Fast Signal Score", minval=50, maxval=100)

showZones       = input.bool(true, "Show Pressure Zones")
showHeatmap     = input.bool(true, "Show Heatmap Candles")
showSignals     = input.bool(true, "Show Entry Signals")
showDashboard   = input.bool(true, "Show Dashboard")
showEMA         = input.bool(false, "Show EMA")

//━━━━━━━━━━ CORE
ema   = ta.ema(close, emaLen)
volMA = ta.sma(volume, volLen)
rsi   = ta.rsi(close, momLen)
atr   = ta.atr(atrLen)

plot(showEMA ? ema : na, "Trend EMA", color=color.new(color.white, 75))

bullTrend = close > ema
bearTrend = close < ema

highVolume = na(volume) ? true : volume > volMA * volMult

//━━━━━━━━━━ CANDLE PRESSURE
candleRange = high - low
body = math.abs(close - open)
bodyPower = candleRange > 0 ? body / candleRange : 0.0
closePosition = candleRange > 0 ? (close - low) / candleRange : 0.5

bullPressure = close > open and closePosition >= 0.60 and bodyPower >= 0.40
bearPressure = close < open and closePosition <= 0.40 and bodyPower >= 0.40

//━━━━━━━━━━ MOMENTUM
bullMomentum = rsi > 52 and rsi >= rsi[1]
bearMomentum = rsi < 48 and rsi <= rsi[1]

//━━━━━━━━━━ FLOW SCORE
bullScore = 0
bullScore += bullTrend ? 25 : 0
bullScore += highVolume ? 25 : 0
bullScore += bullPressure ? 25 : 0
bullScore += bullMomentum ? 25 : 0

bearScore = 0
bearScore += bearTrend ? 25 : 0
bearScore += highVolume ? 25 : 0
bearScore += bearPressure ? 25 : 0
bearScore += bearMomentum ? 25 : 0

//━━━━━━━━━━ PRESSURE ZONES
strongBullFlow = barstate.isconfirmed and bullScore >= 75 and highVolume and bullPressure
strongBearFlow = barstate.isconfirmed and bearScore >= 75 and highVolume and bearPressure

var box[] bullZones = array.new_box()
var box[] bearZones = array.new_box()

if showZones and strongBullFlow
    b = box.new(
         left=bar_index,
         top=high,
         right=bar_index + zoneExtend,
         bottom=low,
         bgcolor=color.new(color.lime, 88),
         border_color=color.new(color.lime, 45),
         text="Bull Flow",
         text_color=color.lime,
         text_size=size.tiny
    )
    array.push(bullZones, b)

if showZones and strongBearFlow
    b = box.new(
         left=bar_index,
         top=high,
         right=bar_index + zoneExtend,
         bottom=low,
         bgcolor=color.new(color.red, 88),
         border_color=color.new(color.red, 45),
         text="Bear Flow",
         text_color=color.red,
         text_size=size.tiny
    )
    array.push(bearZones, b)

while array.size(bullZones) > maxZones
    old = array.shift(bullZones)
    box.delete(old)

while array.size(bearZones) > maxZones
    old = array.shift(bearZones)
    box.delete(old)

if array.size(bullZones) > 0
    for i = array.size(bullZones) - 1 to 0
        z = array.get(bullZones, i)
        if close < box.get_bottom(z)
            box.delete(z)
            array.remove(bullZones, i)

if array.size(bearZones) > 0
    for i = array.size(bearZones) - 1 to 0
        z = array.get(bearZones, i)
        if close > box.get_top(z)
            box.delete(z)
            array.remove(bearZones, i)

//━━━━━━━━━━ FAST NON-REPAINTING SIGNALS
var int lastSignalBar = na
canSignal = na(lastSignalBar) or bar_index - lastSignalBar > signalCooldown

buySignal = barstate.isconfirmed and canSignal and bullScore >= signalScore and bullTrend and bullPressure
sellSignal = barstate.isconfirmed and canSignal and bearScore >= signalScore and bearTrend and bearPressure

if buySignal or sellSignal
    lastSignalBar := bar_index

//━━━━━━━━━━ HEATMAP
heat =
     bullScore >= 75 ? color.new(color.lime, 55) :
     bullScore >= 50 ? color.new(color.lime, 78) :
     bearScore >= 75 ? color.new(color.red, 55) :
     bearScore >= 50 ? color.new(color.red, 78) :
     na

barcolor(showHeatmap ? heat : na)

//━━━━━━━━━━ SIGNAL PLOTS
plotshape(
     showSignals and buySignal,
     title="BUY",
     text="BUY",
     style=shape.labelup,
     location=location.belowbar,
     color=color.lime,
     textcolor=color.black,
     size=size.small
)

plotshape(
     showSignals and sellSignal,
     title="SELL",
     text="SELL",
     style=shape.labeldown,
     location=location.abovebar,
     color=color.red,
     textcolor=color.white,
     size=size.small
)

//━━━━━━━━━━ DASHBOARD
flowStrength = math.max(bullScore, bearScore)

dominantFlow =
     bullScore > bearScore and bullScore >= 50 ? "Bullish Flow" :
     bearScore > bullScore and bearScore >= 50 ? "Bearish Flow" :
     "Neutral"

var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 7, border_width=1)

if showDashboard and barstate.islast
    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "PEGU", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, "FLOW PRO", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.lime)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "Trend", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, bullTrend ? "Bullish" : bearTrend ? "Bearish" : "Neutral", text_color=bullTrend ? color.lime : bearTrend ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "Volume", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, highVolume ? "Institutional" : "Normal", text_color=highVolume ? color.orange : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "Momentum", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, bullMomentum ? "Bullish" : bearMomentum ? "Bearish" : "Neutral", text_color=bullMomentum ? color.lime : bearMomentum ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "Flow", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, dominantFlow, text_color=str.contains(dominantFlow, "Bullish") ? color.lime : str.contains(dominantFlow, "Bearish") ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "Strength", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, str.tostring(flowStrength) + "%", text_color=flowStrength >= 75 ? color.lime : flowStrength >= 50 ? color.orange : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 6, "Zones", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6, "B " + str.tostring(array.size(bullZones)) + " / S " + str.tostring(array.size(bearZones)), text_color=color.white)

//━━━━━━━━━━ ALERTS
alertcondition(strongBullFlow, title="Bullish Institutional Flow", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Bullish pressure zone detected")
alertcondition(strongBearFlow, title="Bearish Institutional Flow", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Bearish pressure zone detected")
alertcondition(buySignal, title="BUY Signal", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Fast BUY signal confirmed")
alertcondition(sellSignal, title="SELL Signal", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Fast SELL signal confirmed")

name: PEGU Institutional Flow Pro
cap:
PEGU Institutional Flow Pro is a premium institutional order-flow indicator designed to identify where large market participants may be accumulating or distributing positions using volume, momentum, trend, and candle pressure analysis.

Key Features
Institutional volume detection using volume expansion logic
Bullish and bearish pressure zone identification
Candle pressure analysis to measure buying and selling strength
RSI momentum confirmation
Trend filtering with EMA
Heatmap-style candle coloring for instant market sentiment visualization
Automatic institutional flow zones
Clean professional dashboard
Non-repainting BUY and SELL signals
Mobile-friendly chart design
Real-time alerts
code:
//@version=6
indicator("PEGU Institutional Flow Pro", overlay=true, max_boxes_count=100, max_labels_count=50)

//━━━━━━━━━━ INPUTS
emaLen          = input.int(200, "Trend EMA")
volLen          = input.int(20, "Volume MA Length")
volMult         = input.float(1.5, "Institutional Volume Multiplier", step=0.1)
momLen          = input.int(14, "Momentum RSI Length")
atrLen          = input.int(14, "ATR Length")

zoneExtend      = input.int(20, "Pressure Zone Extend", minval=5, maxval=60)
maxZones        = input.int(4, "Max Active Zones", minval=1, maxval=10)
signalCooldown  = input.int(10, "Signal Cooldown Bars", minval=3, maxval=100)
signalScore     = input.int(70, "Fast Signal Score", minval=50, maxval=100)

showZones       = input.bool(true, "Show Pressure Zones")
showHeatmap     = input.bool(true, "Show Heatmap Candles")
showSignals     = input.bool(true, "Show Entry Signals")
showDashboard   = input.bool(true, "Show Dashboard")
showEMA         = input.bool(false, "Show EMA")

//━━━━━━━━━━ CORE
ema   = ta.ema(close, emaLen)
volMA = ta.sma(volume, volLen)
rsi   = ta.rsi(close, momLen)
atr   = ta.atr(atrLen)

plot(showEMA ? ema : na, "Trend EMA", color=color.new(color.white, 75))

bullTrend = close > ema
bearTrend = close < ema

highVolume = na(volume) ? true : volume > volMA * volMult

//━━━━━━━━━━ CANDLE PRESSURE
candleRange = high - low
body = math.abs(close - open)
bodyPower = candleRange > 0 ? body / candleRange : 0.0
closePosition = candleRange > 0 ? (close - low) / candleRange : 0.5

bullPressure = close > open and closePosition >= 0.60 and bodyPower >= 0.40
bearPressure = close < open and closePosition <= 0.40 and bodyPower >= 0.40

//━━━━━━━━━━ MOMENTUM
bullMomentum = rsi > 52 and rsi >= rsi[1]
bearMomentum = rsi < 48 and rsi <= rsi[1]

//━━━━━━━━━━ FLOW SCORE
bullScore = 0
bullScore += bullTrend ? 25 : 0
bullScore += highVolume ? 25 : 0
bullScore += bullPressure ? 25 : 0
bullScore += bullMomentum ? 25 : 0

bearScore = 0
bearScore += bearTrend ? 25 : 0
bearScore += highVolume ? 25 : 0
bearScore += bearPressure ? 25 : 0
bearScore += bearMomentum ? 25 : 0

//━━━━━━━━━━ PRESSURE ZONES
strongBullFlow = barstate.isconfirmed and bullScore >= 75 and highVolume and bullPressure
strongBearFlow = barstate.isconfirmed and bearScore >= 75 and highVolume and bearPressure

var box[] bullZones = array.new_box()
var box[] bearZones = array.new_box()

if showZones and strongBullFlow
    b = box.new(
         left=bar_index,
         top=high,
         right=bar_index + zoneExtend,
         bottom=low,
         bgcolor=color.new(color.lime, 88),
         border_color=color.new(color.lime, 45),
         text="Bull Flow",
         text_color=color.lime,
         text_size=size.tiny
    )
    array.push(bullZones, b)

if showZones and strongBearFlow
    b = box.new(
         left=bar_index,
         top=high,
         right=bar_index + zoneExtend,
         bottom=low,
         bgcolor=color.new(color.red, 88),
         border_color=color.new(color.red, 45),
         text="Bear Flow",
         text_color=color.red,
         text_size=size.tiny
    )
    array.push(bearZones, b)

while array.size(bullZones) > maxZones
    old = array.shift(bullZones)
    box.delete(old)

while array.size(bearZones) > maxZones
    old = array.shift(bearZones)
    box.delete(old)

if array.size(bullZones) > 0
    for i = array.size(bullZones) - 1 to 0
        z = array.get(bullZones, i)
        if close < box.get_bottom(z)
            box.delete(z)
            array.remove(bullZones, i)

if array.size(bearZones) > 0
    for i = array.size(bearZones) - 1 to 0
        z = array.get(bearZones, i)
        if close > box.get_top(z)
            box.delete(z)
            array.remove(bearZones, i)

//━━━━━━━━━━ FAST NON-REPAINTING SIGNALS
var int lastSignalBar = na
canSignal = na(lastSignalBar) or bar_index - lastSignalBar > signalCooldown

buySignal = barstate.isconfirmed and canSignal and bullScore >= signalScore and bullTrend and bullPressure
sellSignal = barstate.isconfirmed and canSignal and bearScore >= signalScore and bearTrend and bearPressure

if buySignal or sellSignal
    lastSignalBar := bar_index

//━━━━━━━━━━ HEATMAP
heat =
     bullScore >= 75 ? color.new(color.lime, 55) :
     bullScore >= 50 ? color.new(color.lime, 78) :
     bearScore >= 75 ? color.new(color.red, 55) :
     bearScore >= 50 ? color.new(color.red, 78) :
     na

barcolor(showHeatmap ? heat : na)

//━━━━━━━━━━ SIGNAL PLOTS
plotshape(
     showSignals and buySignal,
     title="BUY",
     text="BUY",
     style=shape.labelup,
     location=location.belowbar,
     color=color.lime,
     textcolor=color.black,
     size=size.small
)

plotshape(
     showSignals and sellSignal,
     title="SELL",
     text="SELL",
     style=shape.labeldown,
     location=location.abovebar,
     color=color.red,
     textcolor=color.white,
     size=size.small
)

//━━━━━━━━━━ DASHBOARD
flowStrength = math.max(bullScore, bearScore)

dominantFlow =
     bullScore > bearScore and bullScore >= 50 ? "Bullish Flow" :
     bearScore > bullScore and bearScore >= 50 ? "Bearish Flow" :
     "Neutral"

var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 7, border_width=1)

if showDashboard and barstate.islast
    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "PEGU", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, "FLOW PRO", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.lime)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "Trend", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, bullTrend ? "Bullish" : bearTrend ? "Bearish" : "Neutral", text_color=bullTrend ? color.lime : bearTrend ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "Volume", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, highVolume ? "Institutional" : "Normal", text_color=highVolume ? color.orange : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "Momentum", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, bullMomentum ? "Bullish" : bearMomentum ? "Bearish" : "Neutral", text_color=bullMomentum ? color.lime : bearMomentum ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "Flow", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, dominantFlow, text_color=str.contains(dominantFlow, "Bullish") ? color.lime : str.contains(dominantFlow, "Bearish") ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "Strength", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, str.tostring(flowStrength) + "%", text_color=flowStrength >= 75 ? color.lime : flowStrength >= 50 ? color.orange : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 6, "Zones", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6, "B " + str.tostring(array.size(bullZones)) + " / S " + str.tostring(array.size(bearZones)), text_color=color.white)

//━━━━━━━━━━ ALERTS
alertcondition(strongBullFlow, title="Bullish Institutional Flow", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Bullish pressure zone detected")
alertcondition(strongBearFlow, title="Bearish Institutional Flow", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Bearish pressure zone detected")
alertcondition(buySignal, title="BUY Signal", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Fast BUY signal confirmed")
alertcondition(sellSignal, title="SELL Signal", message="PEGU Institutional Flow Pro: Fast SELL signal confirmed")

//━━━━━━━━━━ INPUTS

volLen          = input.int(20, "Volume MA Length")
volMult         = input.float(1.5, "Institutional Volume Multiplier", step=0.1)

name: PEGU Smart Money Dashboard
cap: PEGU Smart Money Dashboard is a clean institutional-style SMC indicator that detects BOS, CHOCH, liquidity sweeps, premium/discount zones, and automatic supply-demand order blocks with smart cleanup logic, reduced signal spam, and a premium dashboard UI for professional trading analysis.
code:
//@version=6
indicator("PEGU Smart Money Dashboard", overlay=true, max_boxes_count=30, max_labels_count=30, max_lines_count=30)

//━━━━━━━━━━ INPUTS
swingLen    = input.int(8, "Structure Strength", minval=3)
liqLookback = input.int(30, "Liquidity Lookback", minval=10)
zoneExtend  = input.int(35, "Zone Extend Bars", minval=10)
maxZones    = input.int(2, "Max Active OB Zones", minval=1, maxval=5)

showPD      = input.bool(false, "Show Premium / Discount")
showOB      = input.bool(true, "Show Order Blocks")
showSignals = input.bool(true, "Show BOS / CHOCH / Sweep")
showDash    = input.bool(true, "Show Dashboard")

cooldown    = input.int(15, "Label Cooldown Bars", minval=5)

//━━━━━━━━━━ COLORS
bullOBColor = color.new(color.lime, 86)
bearOBColor = color.new(color.red, 86)
pdPremium   = color.new(color.red, 93)
pdDiscount  = color.new(color.lime, 93)

//━━━━━━━━━━ STRUCTURE
ph = ta.pivothigh(high, swingLen, swingLen)
pl = ta.pivotlow(low, swingLen, swingLen)

var float lastHigh = na
var float lastLow  = na
var string trend   = "Neutral"

if not na(ph)
    lastHigh := ph

if not na(pl)
    lastLow := pl

bosBull = barstate.isconfirmed and not na(lastHigh) and close > lastHigh and close[1] <= lastHigh
bosBear = barstate.isconfirmed and not na(lastLow) and close < lastLow and close[1] >= lastLow

chochBull = bosBull and trend == "Bearish"
chochBear = bosBear and trend == "Bullish"

if bosBull
    trend := "Bullish"

if bosBear
    trend := "Bearish"

//━━━━━━━━━━ LIQUIDITY SWEEP
prevHigh = ta.highest(high[1], liqLookback)
prevLow  = ta.lowest(low[1], liqLookback)

bslSweep = barstate.isconfirmed and high > prevHigh and close < prevHigh
sslSweep = barstate.isconfirmed and low < prevLow and close > prevLow

//━━━━━━━━━━ LABEL COOLDOWN
var int lastLabelBar = na
canLabel = na(lastLabelBar) or bar_index - lastLabelBar > cooldown

if showSignals and canLabel
    if chochBull
        label.new(bar_index, low, "CHOCH", style=label.style_label_up, color=color.aqua, textcolor=color.black, size=size.tiny)
        lastLabelBar := bar_index
    else if chochBear
        label.new(bar_index, high, "CHOCH", style=label.style_label_down, color=color.orange, textcolor=color.black, size=size.tiny)
        lastLabelBar := bar_index
    else if bosBull
        label.new(bar_index, low, "BOS", style=label.style_label_up, color=color.lime, textcolor=color.black, size=size.tiny)
        lastLabelBar := bar_index
    else if bosBear
        label.new(bar_index, high, "BOS", style=label.style_label_down, color=color.red, textcolor=color.white, size=size.tiny)
        lastLabelBar := bar_index
    else if bslSweep
        label.new(bar_index, high, "BSL Sweep", style=label.style_label_down, color=color.red, textcolor=color.white, size=size.tiny)
        lastLabelBar := bar_index
    else if sslSweep
        label.new(bar_index, low, "SSL Sweep", style=label.style_label_up, color=color.lime, textcolor=color.black, size=size.tiny)
        lastLabelBar := bar_index

//━━━━━━━━━━ PREMIUM / DISCOUNT SMALL RIGHT-SIDE ONLY
rangeHigh = ta.highest(high, 120)
rangeLow  = ta.lowest(low, 120)
midline   = (rangeHigh + rangeLow) / 2

var box premiumBox = na
var box discountBox = na
var line midLine = na

if showPD and barstate.islast
    box.delete(premiumBox)
    box.delete(discountBox)
    line.delete(midLine)

    premiumBox := box.new(bar_index - 20, rangeHigh, bar_index + zoneExtend, midline, bgcolor=pdPremium, border_color=color.new(color.red, 90))
    discountBox := box.new(bar_index - 20, midline, bar_index + zoneExtend, rangeLow, bgcolor=pdDiscount, border_color=color.new(color.lime, 90))
    midLine := line.new(bar_index - 20, midline, bar_index + zoneExtend, midline, color=color.new(color.white, 65), style=line.style_dashed)

//━━━━━━━━━━ ORDER BLOCK STORAGE
var box[] bullOBs = array.new_box()
var box[] bearOBs = array.new_box()

f_bull_ob() =>
    float top = na
    float bottom = na
    for i = 1 to 12
        if close[i] < open[i]
            top := high[i]
            bottom := low[i]
            break
    [top, bottom]

f_bear_ob() =>
    float top = na
    float bottom = na
    for i = 1 to 12
        if close[i] > open[i]
            top := high[i]
            bottom := low[i]
            break
    [top, bottom]

//━━━━━━━━━━ CREATE CLEAN OB ONLY AFTER CHOCH / BOS
if showOB and (bosBull or chochBull)
    [top, bottom] = f_bull_ob()
    if not na(top)
        b = box.new(bar_index, top, bar_index + zoneExtend, bottom, bgcolor=bullOBColor, border_color=color.new(color.lime, 40), text="Demand", text_color=color.lime, text_size=size.tiny)
        array.push(bullOBs, b)

if showOB and (bosBear or chochBear)
    [top, bottom] = f_bear_ob()
    if not na(top)
        b = box.new(bar_index, top, bar_index + zoneExtend, bottom, bgcolor=bearOBColor, border_color=color.new(color.red, 40), text="Supply", text_color=color.red, text_size=size.tiny)
        array.push(bearOBs, b)

//━━━━━━━━━━ LIMIT ZONES
while array.size(bullOBs) > maxZones
    old = array.shift(bullOBs)
    box.delete(old)

while array.size(bearOBs) > maxZones
    old = array.shift(bearOBs)
    box.delete(old)

//━━━━━━━━━━ DELETE INVALID ZONES
if array.size(bullOBs) > 0
    for i = array.size(bullOBs) - 1 to 0
        b = array.get(bullOBs, i)
        if close < box.get_bottom(b)
            box.delete(b)
            array.remove(bullOBs, i)

if array.size(bearOBs) > 0
    for i = array.size(bearOBs) - 1 to 0
        b = array.get(bearOBs, i)
        if close > box.get_top(b)
            box.delete(b)
            array.remove(bearOBs, i)

//━━━━━━━━━━ DASHBOARD
pdZone = close > midline ? "Premium" : close < midline ? "Discount" : "EQ"
liqText = bslSweep ? "BSL Swept" : sslSweep ? "SSL Swept" : "Waiting"
bias = trend == "Bullish" and sslSweep ? "Bullish Setup" : trend == "Bearish" and bslSweep ? "Bearish Setup" : trend

var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 6, border_width=1)

if showDash and barstate.islast
    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "PEGU", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, "SMC PRO", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.lime)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "Structure", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, trend, text_color=trend == "Bullish" ? color.lime : trend == "Bearish" ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "Bias", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, bias, text_color=str.contains(bias, "Bullish") ? color.lime : str.contains(bias, "Bearish") ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "Liquidity", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, liqText, text_color=bslSweep ? color.red : sslSweep ? color.lime : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "PD Zone", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, pdZone, text_color=pdZone == "Discount" ? color.lime : pdZone == "Premium" ? color.red : color.gray)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "Active OB", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, str.tostring(array.size(bullOBs) + array.size(bearOBs)), text_color=color.lime)

//━━━━━━━━━━ ALERTS
alertcondition(bosBull, "Bullish BOS", "PEGU SMC PRO: Bullish BOS detected")
alertcondition(bosBear, "Bearish BOS", "PEGU SMC PRO: Bearish BOS detected")
alertcondition(chochBull, "Bullish CHOCH", "PEGU SMC PRO: Bullish CHOCH detected")
alertcondition(chochBear, "Bearish CHOCH", "PEGU SMC PRO: Bearish CHOCH detected")
alertcondition(bslSweep, "BSL Sweep", "PEGU SMC PRO: Buy-side liquidity swept")
alertcondition(sslSweep, "SSL Sweep", "PEGU SMC PRO: Sell-side liquidity swept")

name: PEGU AI Trend Matrix
cap:
PEGU AI Trend Matrix is a premium multi-timeframe trend dashboard that combines EMA trend, RSI momentum, MACD strength, and market structure logic to generate AI-style bullish or bearish confidence scores across 1m, 5m, 15m, 1H, and 4H timeframes.

It provides:

Smart trend analysis
AI confidence scoring
Multi-timeframe bias detection
Clean premium dashboard
Non-repainting logic
Strong bullish/bearish alerts

Built for scalpers, intraday, and smart money traders who want fast and clean market direction confirmation.
code:
//@version=6
indicator("PEGU AI Trend Matrix", overlay=true, max_labels_count=50)

//━━━━━━━━━━ INPUTS
emaFastLen = input.int(50, "Fast EMA")
emaSlowLen = input.int(200, "Slow EMA")
rsiLen     = input.int(14, "RSI Length")
macdFast   = input.int(12, "MACD Fast")
macdSlow   = input.int(26, "MACD Slow")
macdSignal = input.int(9, "MACD Signal")
swingLen   = input.int(5, "Market Structure Swing Length")

showEMA    = input.bool(true, "Show EMA Filter")

//━━━━━━━━━━ CURRENT CHART EMA
emaFast = ta.ema(close, emaFastLen)
emaSlow = ta.ema(close, emaSlowLen)

plot(showEMA ? emaFast : na, "Fast EMA", color=color.new(color.lime, 70))
plot(showEMA ? emaSlow : na, "Slow EMA", color=color.new(color.white, 75))

//━━━━━━━━━━ TREND SCORE FUNCTION
f_score() =>
    fast = ta.ema(close, emaFastLen)
    slow = ta.ema(close, emaSlowLen)
    rsi  = ta.rsi(close, rsiLen)
    [macdLine, signalLine, hist] = ta.macd(close, macdFast, macdSlow, macdSignal)

    ph = ta.pivothigh(high, swingLen, swingLen)
    pl = ta.pivotlow(low, swingLen, swingLen)

    var float lastHigh = na
    var float lastLow = na

    if not na(ph)
        lastHigh := ph

    if not na(pl)
        lastLow := pl

    bullStructure = not na(lastHigh) and close > lastHigh
    bearStructure = not na(lastLow) and close < lastLow

    score = 0
    score += fast > slow ? 25 : fast < slow ? -25 : 0
    score += close > fast ? 20 : close < fast ? -20 : 0
    score += rsi > 55 ? 20 : rsi < 45 ? -20 : 0
    score += macdLine > signalLine and hist > 0 ? 20 : macdLine < signalLine and hist < 0 ? -20 : 0
    score += bullStructure ? 15 : bearStructure ? -15 : 0

    score

//━━━━━━━━━━ MULTI TIMEFRAME SCORES
score1m  = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "1", f_score(), barmerge.gaps_off, barmerge.lookahead_off)
score5m  = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "5", f_score(), barmerge.gaps_off, barmerge.lookahead_off)
score15m = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "15", f_score(), barmerge.gaps_off, barmerge.lookahead_off)
score1h  = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "60", f_score(), barmerge.gaps_off, barmerge.lookahead_off)
score4h  = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "240", f_score(), barmerge.gaps_off, barmerge.lookahead_off)

//━━━━━━━━━━ HELPERS
f_bias(score) =>
    score >= 50 ? "Strong Bullish" :
     score >= 20 ? "Bullish" :
     score <= -50 ? "Strong Bearish" :
     score <= -20 ? "Bearish" : "Neutral"

f_conf(score) =>
    str.tostring(math.min(math.abs(score), 100)) + "%"

f_color(score) =>
    score >= 50 ? color.lime :
     score >= 20 ? color.new(color.lime, 25) :
     score <= -50 ? color.red :
     score <= -20 ? color.new(color.red, 25) : color.gray

//━━━━━━━━━━ OVERALL AI CONFIDENCE
overallScore = math.round((score1m + score5m + score15m + score1h + score4h) / 5)
overallBias = f_bias(overallScore)

//━━━━━━━━━━ DASHBOARD
var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 4, 8, border_width=1)

if barstate.islast
    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "PEGU", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, "AI TREND", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.lime)
    table.cell(dash, 2, 0, "MATRIX", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 3, 0, "PRO", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.lime)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "TF", bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0), text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, "Bias", bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0), text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 2, 1, "Score", bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0), text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 3, 1, "Power", bgcolor=color.new(color.black, 0), text_color=color.white)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "1m", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, f_bias(score1m), text_color=f_color(score1m))
    table.cell(dash, 2, 2, str.tostring(score1m), text_color=f_color(score1m))
    table.cell(dash, 3, 2, f_conf(score1m), text_color=f_color(score1m))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "5m", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, f_bias(score5m), text_color=f_color(score5m))
    table.cell(dash, 2, 3, str.tostring(score5m), text_color=f_color(score5m))
    table.cell(dash, 3, 3, f_conf(score5m), text_color=f_color(score5m))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "15m", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, f_bias(score15m), text_color=f_color(score15m))
    table.cell(dash, 2, 4, str.tostring(score15m), text_color=f_color(score15m))
    table.cell(dash, 3, 4, f_conf(score15m), text_color=f_color(score15m))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "1H", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, f_bias(score1h), text_color=f_color(score1h))
    table.cell(dash, 2, 5, str.tostring(score1h), text_color=f_color(score1h))
    table.cell(dash, 3, 5, f_conf(score1h), text_color=f_color(score1h))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 6, "4H", text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6, f_bias(score4h), text_color=f_color(score4h))
    table.cell(dash, 2, 6, str.tostring(score4h), text_color=f_color(score4h))
    table.cell(dash, 3, 6, f_conf(score4h), text_color=f_color(score4h))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 7, "AI Bias", bgcolor=color.black, text_color=color.white)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 7, overallBias, bgcolor=color.black, text_color=f_color(overallScore))
    table.cell(dash, 2, 7, str.tostring(overallScore), bgcolor=color.black, text_color=f_color(overallScore))
    table.cell(dash, 3, 7, f_conf(overallScore), bgcolor=color.black, text_color=f_color(overallScore))

//━━━━━━━━━━ ALERTS
bullAlert = overallScore >= 50 and overallScore[1] < 50
bearAlert = overallScore <= -50 and overallScore[1] > -50

alertcondition(bullAlert, title="PEGU AI Trend Bullish", message="PEGU AI Trend Matrix: Strong bullish market bias")
alertcondition(bearAlert, title="PEGU AI Trend Bearish", message="PEGU AI Trend Matrix: Strong bearish market bias")

name: SUPPLY AND DEMAND VIP
cap: ITS SHOWS FUTURE SUPPLY AND DEMAND ZONE
code:
//@version=6
strategy("PEGU Pro Supply Demand Scalper v2 - Clean Saleable",
     overlay=true,
     initial_capital=100000,
     commission_type=strategy.commission.percent,
     commission_value=0.03,
     pyramiding=0,
     process_orders_on_close=true,
     calc_on_every_tick=false,
     max_boxes_count=20,
     max_labels_count=50)

// INPUTS
swingLen    = input.int(8, "Swing Strength", minval=3)
atrLen      = input.int(14, "ATR Length")
zoneATR     = input.float(0.45, "Zone Size ATR", step=0.05)
rr          = input.float(2.0, "Risk Reward", step=0.25)
riskPercent = input.float(1.0, "Risk % Per Trade", step=0.25)

showOnlyFresh = input.bool(true, "Show Only Fresh Latest Zones")
showEMA        = input.bool(true, "Show EMA Filter")
emaLen         = input.int(50, "EMA Length")

useVolume = input.bool(true, "Use High Volume Confirmation")
volLen    = input.int(20, "Volume MA")
volMult   = input.float(1.3, "Volume Multiplier", step=0.1)

// DATA
atr = ta.atr(atrLen)
ema = ta.ema(close, emaLen)
volMA = ta.sma(volume, volLen)
volOK = not useVolume or volume > volMA * volMult

bullTrend = close > ema
bearTrend = close < ema

ph = ta.pivothigh(high, swingLen, swingLen)
pl = ta.pivotlow(low, swingLen, swingLen)

// OBJECTS
var box demandBox = na
var box supplyBox = na
var label demandLabel = na
var label supplyLabel = na

var bool demandUsed = false
var bool supplyUsed = false

// CREATE FRESH DEMAND
if not na(pl)
    if showOnlyFresh
        box.delete(demandBox)
        label.delete(demandLabel)

    dTop = pl + atr[swingLen] * zoneATR
    dBot = pl

    demandBox := box.new(
         bar_index - swingLen,
         dTop,
         bar_index + 80,
         dBot,
         bgcolor=color.new(color.lime, 88),
         border_color=color.new(color.lime, 15))

    demandLabel := label.new(
         bar_index - swingLen,
         dTop,
         "Fresh Demand",
         style=label.style_label_down,
         color=color.lime,
         textcolor=color.black,
         size=size.tiny)

    demandUsed := false

// CREATE FRESH SUPPLY
if not na(ph)
    if showOnlyFresh
        box.delete(supplyBox)
        label.delete(supplyLabel)

    sTop = ph
    sBot = ph - atr[swingLen] * zoneATR

    supplyBox := box.new(
         bar_index - swingLen,
         sTop,
         bar_index + 80,
         sBot,
         bgcolor=color.new(color.red, 88),
         border_color=color.new(color.red, 15))

    supplyLabel := label.new(
         bar_index - swingLen,
         sBot,
         "Fresh Supply",
         style=label.style_label_up,
         color=color.red,
         textcolor=color.white,
         size=size.tiny)

    supplyUsed := false

// EXTEND CURRENT ZONES
if not na(demandBox)
    box.set_right(demandBox, bar_index + 40)

if not na(supplyBox)
    box.set_right(supplyBox, bar_index + 40)

// DELETE BROKEN ZONES
if not na(demandBox) and close < box.get_bottom(demandBox)
    box.delete(demandBox)
    label.delete(demandLabel)
    demandBox := na
    demandLabel := na

if not na(supplyBox) and close > box.get_top(supplyBox)
    box.delete(supplyBox)
    label.delete(supplyLabel)
    supplyBox := na
    supplyLabel := na

// SETUP CONDITIONS
inDemand = not na(demandBox) and low <= box.get_top(demandBox) and close >= box.get_bottom(demandBox)
inSupply = not na(supplyBox) and high >= box.get_bottom(supplyBox) and close <= box.get_top(supplyBox)

buyReject = inDemand and close > open and close > box.get_top(demandBox)
sellReject = inSupply and close < open and close < box.get_bottom(supplyBox)

buySignal = buyReject and not demandUsed and bullTrend and volOK
sellSignal = sellReject and not supplyUsed and bearTrend and volOK

// RISK
buySL = not na(demandBox) ? box.get_bottom(demandBox) - atr * 0.15 : na
buyRisk = close - buySL
buyTP = close + buyRisk * rr

sellSL = not na(supplyBox) ? box.get_top(supplyBox) + atr * 0.15 : na
sellRisk = sellSL - close
sellTP = close - sellRisk * rr

riskCash = strategy.equity * riskPercent / 100
buyQty = buyRisk > syminfo.mintick ? riskCash / buyRisk : na
sellQty = sellRisk > syminfo.mintick ? riskCash / sellRisk : na

// EXECUTION
if buySignal and strategy.position_size == 0 and not na(buyQty)
    strategy.entry("BUY", strategy.long, qty=buyQty)
    strategy.exit("BUY TP/SL", "BUY", stop=buySL, limit=buyTP)
    demandUsed := true
    label.new(bar_index, low, "BUY SETUP\nDemand Rejection",
         style=label.style_label_up,
         color=color.lime,
         textcolor=color.black,
         size=size.small)

if sellSignal and strategy.position_size == 0 and not na(sellQty)
    strategy.entry("SELL", strategy.short, qty=sellQty)
    strategy.exit("SELL TP/SL", "SELL", stop=sellSL, limit=sellTP)
    supplyUsed := true
    label.new(bar_index, high, "SELL SETUP\nSupply Rejection",
         style=label.style_label_down,
         color=color.red,
         textcolor=color.white,
         size=size.small)

// VISUALS
plot(showEMA ? ema : na, "Trend EMA", color=color.orange)

plotshape(buySignal, title="BUY", text="BUY", style=shape.triangleup,
     location=location.belowbar, color=color.lime, size=size.small)

plotshape(sellSignal, title="SELL", text="SELL", style=shape.triangledown,
     location=location.abovebar, color=color.red, size=size.small)

// ALERTS
alertcondition(buySignal, "BUY Setup", "PEGU Pro BUY setup from fresh demand")
alertcondition(sellSignal, "SELL Setup", "PEGU Pro SELL setup from fresh supply")
preview:

strategy("PEGU Pro Supply Demand Scalper v2 - Clean Saleable",

// INPUTS

zoneATR     = input.float(0.45, "Zone Size ATR", step=0.05)
rr          = input.float(2.0, "Risk Reward", step=0.25)
riskPercent = input.float(1.0, "Risk
